name: Entitlement Quality Monitor
tagline: Stop overpaying for software your people don't use.
description: Connects to your identity provider, flags entitlement drift in real time, and surfaces remediation actions. Built on FastAPI and Appian. Production-tested for SaaS license recovery.

name: Resiliency Testing Orchestrator
tagline: Run a BCP test without calling a meeting.
description: OOR-first business continuity simulator. Define your recovery scope, run a scenario, and get a structured gap report — no consultant required. FastAPI backend with Streamlit UI.

name: Human Workforce Analytics
tagline: Your content strategy, driven by actual channel data.
description: Auto-refreshing YouTube analytics dashboard that pulls live metrics every 4 hours via GitHub Actions. Tracks views, watch time, subscriber growth, and top content — no manual exports.

name: Knowledge Evolution Layer
tagline: Track what your organization knows — before the gap becomes a liability.
description: Embeddings-based drift detection that surfaces how institutional knowledge diverges from team behavior over time. Routes queries across local and cloud LLMs based on sensitivity.

name: Layman's Spending Assessment
tagline: Plain-English answers to 'where is my money going?'
description: Local Streamlit app that ingests RocketMoney CSV exports and provides an AI-powered spending dashboard with Claude chat. Distributed as a zip — no cloud dependency, no data leaves your machine.
